# AI Compass

AI Compass is a Chinese and English AI tools directory and daily AI news site.

Site URL: https://kjc613.github.io/ai-compass/
Sitemap: https://kjc613.github.io/ai-compass/sitemap.xml
News page: https://kjc613.github.io/ai-compass/news.html

Main topics:
- AI tools and official website links
- AI coding tools and developer workflows
- AI agents and automation
- AI image, video, voice, and generation workflows
- Daily AI news from official blogs and technology media

Important category pages:
- https://kjc613.github.io/ai-compass/categories/agents-automation.html
- https://kjc613.github.io/ai-compass/categories/ai-app-builders.html
- https://kjc613.github.io/ai-compass/categories/data-enterprise-ai.html
- https://kjc613.github.io/ai-compass/categories/developer-tools.html
- https://kjc613.github.io/ai-compass/categories/foundation-models-api.html
- https://kjc613.github.io/ai-compass/categories/generation-workflows.html
- https://kjc613.github.io/ai-compass/categories/image-design.html
- https://kjc613.github.io/ai-compass/categories/knowledge-retrieval.html
- https://kjc613.github.io/ai-compass/categories/marketing-content.html
- https://kjc613.github.io/ai-compass/categories/model-community.html
- https://kjc613.github.io/ai-compass/categories/productivity.html
- https://kjc613.github.io/ai-compass/categories/search-qa.html
- https://kjc613.github.io/ai-compass/categories/video-creative.html
- https://kjc613.github.io/ai-compass/categories/voice-audio.html
